About Me

Finance.
Precision.
Purpose.

I am an ACCA Professional Level candidate with demonstrated expertise in full-cycle bookkeeping, IFRS-aligned financial reporting, and cloud-based accounting systems. Currently managing three active client relationships across Xero and QuickBooks Online.

My track record is built on zero-discrepancy reconciliations, timely month-end close, and structured working papers that satisfy audit-readiness standards — grounded in a rigorous ACCA technical foundation scoring 80+ in both Financial Reporting and UK Taxation.

I combine technical precision with commercial awareness, translating financial data into reporting packs that drive informed decisions — not just compliant numbers.

My Work

Featured Projects

A selection of financial and analytical engagements demonstrating depth of technical expertise.

Live Client Work · Flagship

Full-Cycle Bookkeeping — 3 Active Business Clients

Providing full-cycle bookkeeping for three active business clients across retail, services, and hospitality. Responsibilities span daily transaction coding, bank reconciliations with zero discrepancies, AP&/AR management, payroll processing, BAS preparation and lodgement, and month-end close. Deliverables include P&L statements, balance sheets, and cash flow summaries — all produced on time and audit-ready. Operated entirely via Xero and QuickBooks Online with cloud-based document management.

XeroQuickBooksReconciliationsP&L / Balance SheetMonth-End Close
View Case Study
02
Financial Modelling · 2025

DCF Equity Valuation — Nepal Telecom

Constructed a comprehensive discounted cash flow model for Nepal Telecom (NTC), a listed telecommunications company. Projected 10-year free cash flows using historical financials and sector growth assumptions, derived WACC through the Capital Asset Pricing Model, and calculated intrinsic equity value per share. Included a multi-variable sensitivity table analysing the impact of changes in discount rate, terminal growth rate, and revenue growth — producing a fair value range and investment thesis backed by financial data.

DCF ModellingWACC / CAPMExcelSensitivity
View Model
03
ACCA Edge · AI in Finance

ACCA Edge — Mastering AI & Prompt Engineering

An applied research and workflow project exploring how AI tools can enhance the efficiency of accounting and finance practice. Covers prompt engineering techniques tailored for financial analysis, automated report drafting, data interpretation using large language models, and integration with cloud accounting platforms. Produced structured prompt libraries and use-case frameworks relevant to ACCA-level practitioners — bridging technical AI capability with professional accounting standards and ethical considerations.

AI in AccountingPrompt EngineeringAutomation
Open Project
04
Business Strategy · 2025

Harbourline — Strategic Business Analysis

A detailed strategic and financial analysis of Harbourline, a real-world business case. The project examines organisational structure, competitive positioning, revenue streams, and cost drivers through both qualitative frameworks (SWOT, PESTLE, Porter's Five Forces) and quantitative financial review. Delivers actionable growth recommendations, risk mitigation strategies, and a prioritised implementation roadmap — structured as a professional consulting-style report suitable for board-level presentation.

StrategyFinancial AnalysisSWOTBusiness Planning
View Analysis
